metadata.title: Build repair: step 6 (Acceptance: help | run py -3 smoke_check.py --help | verify: exists . | verify: exists -3 | verify: output_contains usage:)

steps.title: Ensure index.html has required structure | apply_patch index.html | patch: @@ -1,0 +1,7 @@ | verify: exists .
Ensure index.html has interactive elements | apply_patch index.html | patch: @@ -4,0 +5 @@ | verify: exists .

action.contents:
from pathlib import Path
import sys

INTENT_KEYWORDS = ["dashboard", "monitor", "window"]
def main() -> int:
    html_path = Path("index.html")
    if not html_path.exists():
        raise SystemExit("index.html missing")
    text = html_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8").lower()
    required = ["<html", "</html>", "<body", "</body>"]
    missing = [needle for needle in required if needle not in text]
    if missing:
        raise SystemExit("missing required html structure: " + ", ".join(missing))
    has_behavior = "<script" in text or "<form" in text or "button" in text or "canvas" in text
    if not has_behavior:
        raise SystemExit("page has no obvious interactive/behavior surface")
    missing_keywords = [word for word in INTENT_KEYWORDS if word not in text]
    if len(missing_keywords) > max(2, len(INTENT_KEYWORDS) // 2):
        raise SystemExit("page appears weakly tied to request; missing keywords: " + ", ".join(missing_keywords))
    if len(sys.argv) > 1 and sys.argv[1] == "--help":
        print("usage: smoke_check.py [--help]")
        return 0
    print("usage: smoke_check.py [--help]")
    return 0
if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
